title: The Last Clean Water Pact
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a drought-ravaged America where water is doled by corporate hydration credits, a hydrologist discovers the aquifer beneath the dead zone is still full and the company has been lying for decades to keep prices high.
long_description: In a drought-ravaged America where water is doled by corporate hydration credits, a hydrologist discovers the aquifer beneath the dead zone is still full and the company has been lying for decades to keep prices high.
